markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Johanna to the growthx.ai engagement and current SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual-Track Strategy:** growthx.ai is driving organic traffic via two parallel tracks: an editorial blog (`/guides`) and an interactive template library (`/templates`).](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Template Strategy:** The `/templates` strategy prioritizes high-volume, low-competition website templates (e.g., portfolios) to capture immediate traffic, deferring higher-intent SaaS/internal tool templates until more user data is analyzed.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Future Work:** A technical SEO audit is scheduled for next week. A deeper analysis of user prompt data, similar to prior work with Bolt, is a potential future project to align content with Lovable's core ICPs.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Team Handoff:** George Haikal will hand off account management to Megan (Director) in two weeks, who will become the new primary contact.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### Johanna's Onboarding & Goals

  - [Johanna Ydergård, new Product Marketing lead, now owns the Lovable website.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [**Primary Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Understand the full scope of the growthx.ai engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Clarify the SEO/AEO strategy and technical status.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Identify and address technical website gaps (e.g., missing sitemap).](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### growthx.ai Engagement Overview

  - [**Objective:** Build a foundation for organic traffic (weeks 1–8), then scale volume.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Two Core Strategies:**](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
    1.  **Editorial Content (`/guides`):**
          - [**Approach:** Publish articles based on competitive analysis and keyword gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
          - [**Status:** 11 articles published; all indexed and driving clicks within 1.5 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
          - [**Plan:** Scale to 5 articles/week, focusing on high-performing formats (comparisons, listicles).](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
    2.  **Interactive Templates (`/templates`):**
          - [**Approach:** Create a library of high-quality, interactive templates users can "remix" directly in Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
          - [**Status:** Launched; will add category filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
          - [**Plan:** Scale to 5 templates/week.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Template Strategy: Rationale & Future

  - [**Initial Focus → Website Templates:**](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Competitor analysis (Wix, Webflow) revealed website templates offer the highest search volume with the lowest competition.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture immediate traffic by targeting low-hanging fruit.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [**Future Focus → SaaS/Internal Tool Templates:**](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with Lovable's core ICPs (entrepreneurs, PMs) and highest-retention users.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
      - [**Path Forward:** Requires analyzing user prompt data to identify specific build goals and pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
          - [**Precedent:** This method was used successfully with Bolt to identify "trigger moments" (e.g., 5+ prompts) that correlated with higher retention.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

### Additional Projects & Team Structure

  - [**Technical SEO Audit:** A comprehensive audit is scheduled for the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Legacy Page Cleanup:** Recommended temporarily redirecting thousands of low-value pages from the previous agency (Growth Hackers) to the homepage to consolidate SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**AEO Tracking:** Using a custom tool to track thousands of prompts and report on Lovable's visibility in AI search results.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [**Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**George Haikal:** Project lead (until handoff).](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Megan:** New primary contact (post-handoff).](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Ada:** Editorial lead.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [**Nico:** Engineer (publishing).](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [**George Main:** Designer.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

      - [Confirm the date for the technical SEO audit.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Johanna Ydergård:**](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
      - [Connect with Sebastian Schaff to align on the templates strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [Coordinate with Jason on the upcoming webinar event.](https://fathom.video/share/QW5V7ms9hRyygmLj_Zmd8RzzHi5XwXgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
